name: Olive Garden Shrimp Scampi Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together the Italian salad dressing, dry mustard, Tabasco sauce, and ketchup until smooth.
2. Cover tightly and refrigerate for up to one week. For longer storage, transfer to freezer-safe packaging and freeze for up to four months.
3. Thaw in the refrigerator when ready to use.
